title: Shrimp and Scallop Seafood Tagine
description: This Italian-inspired dish combines the flavors of Egypt with the freshness of seafood. A hearty and aromatic tagine made with shrimp, scallops, and a blend of spices.

ingredients.name: Mixed tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: or use a mix of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp and scallops and cook until they start to brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the white wine and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 5-7 minutes, or until the seafood is cooked through.
Stir in the chopped parsley and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the seafood hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
